name: cubism
description: Geometric fragmentation, multiple viewpoints, angular faceted forms.
palette_hint: muted earth tones with one saturated accent

name: vaporwave
description: Retro-futuristic neon nostalgia: Greek busts, 80s computing, gradient grids.
palette_hint: magenta and cyan on deep purple

name: ukiyo-e
description: Japanese woodblock print: flat color planes, bold linework, asymmetric composition, decorative wave motifs.
palette_hint: indigo, vermilion, gold leaf on cream

name: brutalism
description: Raw exposed concrete, monumental and harsh, naked structure, oversized typography.

name: claymation
description: Hand-sculpted clay aesthetic, soft imperfect edges, tactile and warm.
palette_hint: earthy clay tones, soft creams and rust

name: ascii_terminal
description: Pure text rendering: box-drawing characters, ASCII art, CRT phosphor glow.
palette_hint: monochrome amber or green on black

name: stained_glass
description: Cathedral window panels: thick black leading, saturated colored shards.
palette_hint: jewel tones (ruby, emerald, sapphire) on black grout

name: blueprint
description: Technical drafting on blueprint paper: white linework on blue, dimension lines and measurements visible.

name: risograph
description: Limited-color screen printing: visible registration mismatch, grainy texture, two-color overlay.

name: bauhaus
description: Geometric primitives (circle/triangle/square), primary colors, rigorous grid, sans-serif.
